title: koniga intermedia
intro: Koniga intermedia, also known as the Mexican evening primrose or Oenothera deltoides, is a flowering plant that belongs to the evening primrose family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its rich oil content, which is rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The oil extracted from Koniga intermedia has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of eczema, psoriasis, and other skin conditions, as well as to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Koniga intermedia can be found in the form of capsules, tinctures, and salves, and are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
